sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67256" key="metrio/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετριόω</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετριάω</orth>, implied by the form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μετριῶ</foreign> (s.v.l.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">146</biblScope> </bibl>; but <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐμετρίωμες, μετριώμεναι</foreign> are forms of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μετρέω</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
